--- 
title: "Guide for Wise Investing"
author: "Junghoon Shin"
date: "`r paste(Sys.time(), 'KST')`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
csl: apa-with-abstract.csl
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
url: 'https\://junghoon-shin.github.io/'
github-repo: "junghoon-shin/guide-for-wise-investing"
cover-image: "images/cover1.jpg"
apple-touch-icon: "images/up-arrow.svg"
apple-touch-icon-size: 120
favicon: "images/up-arrow.svg"
description: "Investment data book containing up-to-date company financials, industry and market status, and global economy"
---

```{r, include = F}
# automatically create a bib database for R packages

knitr::write_bib(c(.packages(), "bookdown", "knitr", "rmarkdown"), "packages.bib")
```

```{r, include = F}
# initialize environment

library(pacman)

p_load(bookdown,
       ComplexHeatmap,
       cowplot,
       DT,
       furrr,
       ggpubr,
       googledrive,
       googlesheets4,
       grid,
       gridExtra,
       httr,
       kableExtra,
       knitr,
       magrittr,
       measurements,
       RColorBrewer,
       scales,
       tidyverse,
       XML)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, out.width = "100%")

theme_update(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5))
```

```{r}
# define functions

read_html = function(url, which = integer(), header = T, trim = T) {
  readHTMLTable(rawToChar(GET(url)$content), which = which, header = header, trim = trim)
}

my_datatable = function(tbl, paging = F, pageLength = 5, scrollY = unit(700, "lines"), caption = NULL) {
  DT::datatable(tbl,
                options = list(dom = "lfrtip",
                               paging = paging,
                               pageLength = pageLength,
                               searching = T,
                               ordering = T,
                               scrollX = T, 
                               scrollY = scrollY,
                               fixedColumns = list(leftColumns = 1),
                               colReorder = list(realtime = F),
                               keys = T,
                               autoWidth = T,
                               initComplete = JS("function(settings, json) {", 
                                                 "$(this.api().table().header()).css({'font-size': '14px'});",
                                                 "}")),
                extensions = c("FixedColumns", "ColReorder", "KeyTable"),
              rownames = F,
              caption = caption) %>%
    formatStyle(columns = 1:ncol(tbl), fontSize = "14px")
}
```

# Preface {#preface .unnumbered}

![](images/cover1.jpg)

This project initially aimed to serve as the author's personal resource of automatically updated financial data for guiding unbiased and premeditated investing decision. As the project went along, it has gradually progressed into a more public reference for the author's close friends who are interested in investing and seek a financial data resource which is not [exhausting](https://www.sec.gov/ix?doc=/Archives/edgar/data/320193/000032019320000096/aapl-20200926.htm) but tidy and easy-to-get. All data presented on this project site are updated at least once a day. They were last updated at `r paste(Sys.time(), 'KST')`. This project has been hugely inspired by [Warren Buffett](https://www.berkshirehathaway.com/letters/letters.html), @town2018, @graham2003, and @lee2020. This is a publicly accessible project still in its infant stage, and the author is always open to suggestions from whoever hopes to make it better. Please feel free to [contact the author](#author), or even better make a [pull request](https://docs.github.com/en/github/collaborating-with-issues-and-pull-requests/about-pull-requests)!\
\

![](images/CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0.png){width=120px}

This project is licensed under the [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).
